headline: The Trade Desk (TTD) Stock Trades Down, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of digital advertising platform The Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) fell 3.1% in the afternoon session after the April PPI report sent Treasury yields to 10-month highs, with the 10-year yield rising to 4.49%.
